steps.title: Interpret positive association
steps.content: Bennett found lunar intensity to be positively associated with black lemur foraging. A positive association means the two variables increase together.

steps.title: Keep the finding specific
steps.content: Choice B gives a broader explanatory comparison, Choice C describes desert kangaroo rats, and Choice D adds a claim about reliance on vision. The remaining choice directly states Bennett's finding about black lemurs. The answer is A.
